title: verbascum × prokopiense
intro: Verbascum × prokopiense, also known as Greek mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, skin conditions, and wounds, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Greek mullein include soothing coughs and bronchitis, calming digestive issues, and providing relief from skin irritations, making it a valuable plant in herbal medicine.
